name: Juniper Networks, Inc.
description: Juniper Networks, Inc. is a global leader in AI-driven networking, cloud, and connected security solutions. The company designs, develops, and sells high-performance network infrastructure, including routers, switches, and network management software. Juniper's solutions are engineered to simplify network operations and improve user experiences through automation and insights, serving service providers, enterprises, and public sector organizations worldwide. With a focus on innovation, Juniper enables its customers to build scalable, secure, and efficient networks that support the demands of modern digital transformation and cloud-based services.
